name: test-writing
description: Generate and validate PHPUnit unit tests for Shopware 6. Analyzes source classes to detect category (DTO, Service, Flow/Event, DAL, Exception) and applies category-specific templates. Unified agent+skill pattern: generation and reviewing skills fork into thin agents via context:fork, orchestrator runs inline fix loop (max 4 iterations) with oscillation detection. MCP-driven test rules for Shopware compliance. Bundles MCP server config (requires dev-tooling plugin installed). Configure via .mcp-php-tooling.json.
